generation.selection_rule: decision_reason == pass_all, not in prior expression sets, candidate peer abs corr <= 0.90, max_per_op=1000

mlp_recipe.base_features: overlap333, the intersection of prior Ridge-validated and LightGBM-validated factors

conclusion.interpretation: The 1000 scorecard-pass factors materially improved Ridge after model-specific leave-one-factor-out filtering. For this static MLP recipe, the raw 1000-factor expansion overloaded/redundantly diluted the model; shuffle filtering recovered 0.004114 IC versus adding all 1000, but did not beat the compact 333-factor MLP base in the 2020 OOS run.

mlp_baseline_note: The MLP overlap333 comparison in this artifact is superseded by references/futures/new1000_mlp_old1144_shuffle_summary.json. Use the old1144 -> retained617 -> retained-new534 audit for MLP conclusions.
